name: com.brassworks.sidecar.objective-interactables-set05
description: Isolated Unity sidecar package for visual-only steampunk objective and interactable prop families: pressure levers, keyed locks, crank panels, fuse boxes, breaker gauges, valve routing puzzles, boss override terminals, lift stations, pickups, and objective signage.

samples.description: Notes for isolated Unity preview generation and quarantine review.
